_README: Curated review decisions for detached polygon parts ('outliers') flagged
by scripts/audit_geometry_outliers.py. This file is the human-reviewed
ledger — NOT a place to silently bury problems. Two sections:
clip      — per appellation slug, a list of polygon parts confirmed to be
SPURIOUS (an upstream-data error). Stage 04 drops the matching
part from the resolved geometry and logs every clip. The audit
independently re-verifies each entry against the SOURCE data
every run: a clip that still matches a real part reports as
CONFIRMED; a clip that no longer matches (upstream data drifted
or was fixed) reports as STALE with a loud warning to re-verify.
whitelist — per appellation slug, appellations whose detached parts are
LEGITIMATE (archipelagos, multi-region DOs). The audit lists
them as ACCEPTED rather than UNREVIEWED. Whitelisting suppresses
outlier flagging for the WHOLE slug, so only use it for
appellations whose every detached part has been reviewed.
A clip entry matches a part when its 3035-centroid is within `match_tol_km`
of `centroid_latlon` AND its area is within `area_tol_pct` of `area_km2`.
Exactly one part must match — zero or several is reported as STALE and the
part is NOT clipped (fail loud, never guess).
Every clip entry must cite a public, checkable reason: what the part is, why
it does not belong, and what it overlaps. `verified` is the review date.

drop.reason: Fragment 225 km W of Lake Garda, near Avigliana (Piedmont). Lies 100% inside the Piemonte regional DOC (PDO-IT-A1224). The Garda disciplinare restricts the DOC to the provinces of Brescia, Mantova and Verona — no Piedmont component exists. Bétard 2022 EU_PDO.gpkg cross-attribution error.

Fragment 205 km SW of the Adige valley, in the Monferrato (Piedmont). Lies 100% inside Grignolino d'Asti / Barbera del Monferrato / Monferrato DOCs. Valdadige DOC is the Adige valley (Trento / Bolzano / Verona). Bétard 2022 cross-attribution error — mirror of the Garda case.
Fragment ~215 km NE of the Asti / Monferrato main body, near Trento. Lies 100% inside delle Venezie / Valdadige / Casteller (Trentino). Bétard 2022 cross-attribution error.
Second Trentino fragment, ~218 km NE near Trento, shared verbatim with the other three Monferrato-family DOCs. Bétard 2022 cross-attribution error.
Trentino fragment near Trento (~204 km from the Monferrato main body), shared verbatim across the Monferrato-family DOCs. Bétard 2022 cross-attribution error.
Second Trentino fragment near Trento (~207 km away), shared verbatim across the Monferrato-family DOCs. Bétard 2022 cross-attribution error.
Trentino fragment near Trento (~204 km from the Monferrato main body), shared verbatim across the Monferrato-family DOCs. Bétard 2022 cross-attribution error.
Second Trentino fragment near Trento (~207 km away), shared verbatim across the Monferrato-family DOCs. Bétard 2022 cross-attribution error.
Trentino fragment near Trento (~204 km from the Monferrato main body), shared verbatim across the Monferrato-family DOCs. Bétard 2022 cross-attribution error.
Second Trentino fragment near Trento (~207 km away), shared verbatim across the Monferrato-family DOCs. Bétard 2022 cross-attribution error.

whitelist.madeira: Atlantic archipelago — the DOP spans Madeira, Porto Santo and the Desertas; disjoint island parts are expected.
whitelist.madeirense: Atlantic archipelago — same island footprint as Madeira DOP.
whitelist.islas-canarias: Atlantic archipelago — the DO covers all seven Canary Islands; disjoint island parts are expected.
whitelist.sicilia: Sicily plus its minor-island groups (Pantelleria, Aeolian, Egadi, Ustica) — disjoint island parts are expected.
whitelist.cava: Spanish sparkling-wine DO produced in legally listed municipalities across Catalonia, La Rioja, Aragon, Navarra, the Basque Country, Extremadura and Valencia — genuinely multi-region and disjoint.
whitelist.saale-unstrut: German Anbaugebiet legally extended to Werder (Havel) in Brandenburg — the Werderaner Wachtelberg, Germany's northernmost vineyard. BLE Produktspezifikation §11.3 names the Brandenburg-side Gemarkungen Werder (Havel), Phöben, Plessow and Neu Töplitz; the ~117 km² polygon ~150 km NE of the main Sachsen-Anhalt body (~52.38°N, 12.88°E) is therefore legitimate, not a Bétard cross-attribution.
